home.folderDragHint: Long-press a folder to delete. Drag the grip on the left to reorder.
home.folderDragHintSelect: Tap the checkbox or row to select items, then tap Delete at the bottom. Cancel to exit. Reorder: use the grip lines.

folder.zikirDragHint: Long-press a row to delete. Drag the grip on the left to reorder.
folder.zikirDragHintSelect: Tap the checkbox or row to select items, then tap Delete at the bottom. Cancel to exit. Reorder: use the grip lines.
folder.zikirDragHintSelectNoReorder: Tap the checkbox or row to select items, then tap Delete at the bottom. Cancel to exit. Reordering is off while search or favorites filter is on.
folder.zikirDragHintReorderDisabled: Clear search and turn off the favorites filter to reorder.
folder.limitWarning: This folder has reached the zikir limit. Delete one or move to another folder.

library.title: Zikir library
library.intro: Duas and repetitive dhikr for daily situations. Search covers name, meaning, when to recite, and keywords.
library.searchPlaceholder: Name, meaning, or context (e.g. toilet, travel, sleep)…

settings.title: Settings
settings.wakeFootnote: Keep awake works on the counter screen. May not work on very old devices.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.storageText: This app stores your folders, zikir entries, and counter history on your device (local storage). By default it does not send data externally.
privacy.statsText: Daily tap records are kept on your device; charts show the last 7 days.
privacy.backupText: Data currently lives only on this device. Clearing browser or app data, switching devices, or uninstalling may delete all records; we recommend backing up important data.
privacy.permissionsText: Options such as vibration, sound, and keep screen awake are only for the in-app experience and are optional.

premium.title: Premium
premium.teaserDefault: We're working on Premium. You'll see new things here soon.
premium.teaser0: Premium will unlock trash (restore) and a larger library.
premium.teaser1: Coming soon: restore deleted zikir and more library content with Premium.
premium.teaser3: When Premium launches, trash and the expanded library will be active here.
premium.cardBackupText: Take everything with you when you change devices.
premium.cardStatsText: See your progress toward goals clearly and stay motivated.
premium.cardWeeklyText: A short Monday summary: time, goals, and trends.
premium.cardWeeklyBullet1: Monday notification: busiest day, total time, hours in the app.
premium.cardWeeklyBullet2: Set a daily goal: see how many days you hit it in the weekly report.
premium.cardWeeklyBullet3: Daily average time and % change vs last week (+/−).
premium.cardThemeText: An interface that feels more like yours.
premium.cardRemindersText: Gentle nudges that match your rhythm.
premium.cardTrashText: Restore accidentally deleted zikir with Premium.
premium.cardLibraryText: More dhikr and duas in the library with Premium.
premium.note: Premium features will unlock automatically when active.
premium.trashLockedAlert: Trash will be available with Premium.

zikir.copyTitle: Copy or move to another folder
zikir.name: Zikir name
zikir.virtuePlaceholder: For Esma names, leave blank to use the app's suggested default text.

confirm.deleteZikirsMsg: Permanently delete {count} selected zikir? History for these zikir will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteFoldersMsg: Permanently delete {folderCount} folders and {zikirCount} zikir inside them? This cannot be undone.
confirm.protectedFoldersMsg: “Default dhikr” and “Beautiful Names of Allah” folders cannot be deleted. Deselect them.

zikirMeaning.z_1: Glory be to Allah; He is free from all imperfections.
zikirMeaning.z_4: There is no god but Allah.
